Sunday to Thursday: 4:30 pm to 7 pm
Friday and Saturday: 4:30 pm to 6 pm
Happy hours is served at the bar only and cannot be booked.
Parties are limited to 4 people.

Happy Hour

Happy Hour Menu

  • Baguette et beurre6

    Bread and butter

  • Beignet d’haricot vert*10

    Fried green beans tempura, tomato-basil aioli*

  • Beignet de champignons*10

    Mushroom tempura, tomato-basil aioli*

  • Croustillant de Reblochon15

    Warm and crispy phyllo dough stuffed with reblochon cheese, baby gem greens, honey, lemon vinaigrette**

  • Escargots à l’ail et Pastis**13

    Burgundy snails, garlic and parsley butter**

  • Crevettes au citron vert**15

    Seared lime infused shrimp, risotto cake, arugula pesto**

  • Terrine de porc maison13

    House made pork terrine, pickled vegetables, Dijon mustard

  • Travers de porc à la moutarde16

    Pork baby back ribs, braised Tarbais bean casserole, violette de brive moutarde sauce

  • Raviolis aux champignons15

    Homemade mushroom ravioli, white truffle oil, parmesan, port and mushroom sauce

  • Côtes D’Agneau grillées20

    Grilled lamb loin chops, golden raisin chutney, lemon yogurt sauce, mint gremolata, dill and apple salad

  • Moules marinières18

    Saltspring Island, B.C. Canada mussels, garlic, parsley butter and white wine

  • Moules au bleu18

    Saltspring Island B.C Canada mussels, shallot, garlic, celery, apples, gorgonzola, white wine cream sauce

  • Side of fries*5
  • Side of truffle & parmesan fries*10
  • Assiette de fromage

    Bleu d’Auvergne, Camembert, Brillat Savarin, Reblochon, Tomme de Savoie, Comté
    One: 8 | Two: 12 | Three: 14

  • Split Charge3.5

Happy Cocktails

  • Tequila Mockingbird12

    Monte Alban Silver Tequila, Orange Curaçao, Lime Juice, Passion Fruit and Raspberry Purée, Habanero Bitters

  • Cucumber Gimlet13

    Cutwater Gin, Elderfower Liquor, Ginger Syrup, Lime juice, Cucumber

  • Huckleberry Bourbon13

    Evan Williams Bourbon, Lemon, Infused Agave-Maple-Huckleberry Nectar

  • Don’t Mind if I Do13

    Empress Gin, Lemon Juice, Luxardo, Pavan, Orange Bitters, Luxardo Chjerry

  • Garden Party Mule12

    Cutwater Vodka, Fresh Lime Juice, Ginger, Cassis, Elderflower, Crème De Violette, Ginger Beer, Mint

Happy Beers

  • Boont daylight amber7

    USA /Amber / 5.8%
    Hints of sun toasted grain, toffee, noble hop aromas

  • Almanac true American lager9

    California / Lager / 5%
    Crisp, flavorful, easy going, touch of sweetness from the malt

  • Kronenbourg 16649

    France / European Pale Lager / 5.5%
    Aromatic hoppiness and a subtle bitterness

  • Delirium tremens11

    Belgium / Strong Pale Ale / 8.5%
    Round, long lasting finish, dry-bitter aftertaste
